rulings.Case Title: IN RE: 700 GOETTINGEN STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94134
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioner'S Motion On Order To Deposit Additional Surplus Funds
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 13, 2014, line 7. Petitioner's Motion On Order To Deposit Additional Surplus Funds GRANTED. No opposition filed. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: 1369 HYDE STREET, LTD VS. WILLIAM B. REILLY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reopen Discvoeyr, Compelling X-Deft To Produce Documents And Compelling Deft To Appear For Deposition And For Sanctions;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 13, 2014, line 1. CROSS COMPLAINANTS BARBARA REILLY, MEGHAN REILLY and WILLIAM REILLY's Motion To Reopen Discovery DENIED in part and GRANTED in part. Motion to reopen discovery is denied. Moving parties failed to carry its burden and show that discovery was sought diligently. Meghan and Barbara Reilly have not propounded the discovery at issue. William Reilly served discovery on Plaintiff on the last possible day before the original trial date. Alternative relief is granted in part and denied in part. Alternative relief is denied as to the request for order to appear for deposition. Motion to Compel said deposition was denied on February 27, 2014. Tenants' request is a motion for reconsideration. Tenants do not meet CCP 1008 requirements. Alternative relief as to the documents that landlord agreed to produce in its February 24, 2014 responses is granted. Responses shall be served within 10 days of notice of entry of order. No sanctions. Moving party to prepare order. = (501/AJR)

Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than May 19, 2014 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: ESCALADE CAPITAL GROUP, LLC VS. OLD REPUBLIC TITLE COMPANY
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 13, 2014, line 3. DEFENDANT RICHARD SINGER's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR per moving party on opposing party's representation that amended complaint will be filed on or before May 27, 2014. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: 676 GEARY STREET, LLC VS. JUSTIN CRANDALL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 13, 2014, line 4. DEFENDANT JUSTIN CRANDALL's Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment DENIED. Judgment was entered due to Defendant's failure to comply with the stipulation and make a payment by April 15, 2014. Defendant failed to produce evidence of compliance even though he was given an opportunity to do so twice, on April 21, 2014 and on April 25, 2014. The landlord never received payment allegedly mailed on April 14, 2014. Defendant never produced a receipt/copy of the money order. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: ZHUO HUI HUANG VS. LINDA WILSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons & Third Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 13, 2014, line 5. DEFENDANT LINDA WILSON's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons & Third Amended Complaint Granted in part and denied in part. Motion is GRANTED pursuant to grounds 1-3 enumerated on page 1 of the Points and Authorities. Plaintiff shall have a 5 day leave to amend (1) to properly verify complaint (presently purported verification attached to the Third Amended Complaint verifies Second Amended Complaint); to comply with requirements of CRC 3.1110 and CRC 2.890; to attach the proper Notice. Motion is otherwise denied. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: CONNOLLY HOLDINGS LLC VS. CESARIA KUNG et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 13, 2014, line 6. DEFENDANT CESARIA KUNG's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT GRANTED with leave to amend. Complaint may be verified by "other person" when the "facts are within the knowledge" of such person. However, such person shall still state that the pleading "is true of his own knowledge." See James Milnes makes no such statement and instead states that "the facts and allegations therein are true, to the best of my knowledge." This is insufficient to verify complaint. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN WONG VS. NICK LANHAM et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 13, 2014, line 8. DEFENDANT NICK LANHAM's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED, subject to opposition. = (501/AJR)
